sentences.arabic: الْحُصُولُ عَلَى قِسْطٍ كَافٍ مِنَ النَّوْمِ ضَرُورِيٌّ لِلصِّحَّةِ النَّفْسِيَّةِ وَالْجَسَدِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Dovoljno spavanja je neophodno za mentalno i fizičko zdravlje.
sentences.translationEn: Getting enough sleep is essential for mental and physical health.

sentences.arabic: يَنْصَحُ الْأَطِبَّاءُ بِالنَّوْمِ لِمُدَّةِ سَبْعِ سَاعَاتٍ عَلَى الْأَقَلِّ كُلَّ لَيْلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ljekari preporučuju spavanje najmanje sedam sati svake noći.
sentences.translationEn: Doctors recommend sleeping for at least seven hours every night.

sentences.arabic: قِلَّةُ النَّوْمِ تُسَبِّبُ التَّوَتُّرَ وَعَدَمَ التَّرْكِيزِ.
sentences.translation: Nedostatak sna uzrokuje stres i dekoncentraciju.
sentences.translationEn: Lack of sleep causes stress and a lack of concentration.

sentences.arabic: أُحَاوِلُ دَائِمًا النَّوْمَ مُبَكِّرًا لِأَسْتَيْقِظَ بِنَشَاطٍ.
sentences.translation: Uvijek pokušavam zaspati rano kako bih se probudio odmoran.
sentences.translationEn: I always try to sleep early to wake up refreshed.
